description_long: This is a two-story house surrounded by a dense ring of snow-covered evergreen trees, creating a secluded woodland setting. The house features a green, multi-gabled roof and warm brown exterior walls, with several windows visible on each side. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, contributing to a balanced and orderly appearance. The main entryway is partially visible, set back from the tree line, and appears to have a small porch or overhang. The surrounding trees are closely packed, with their snowy branches forming a natural barrier around the house. The overall scene evokes a cozy, forested retreat, blending residential architecture with a wintry landscape.
description: A two-story brown house with a green gabled roof, encircled by snow-covered evergreen trees, creating a secluded woodland atmosphere.
description_view_0: The house is mostly obscured by the dense front row of snowy trees, with only the upper roof and some windows visible.
description_view_1: This view reveals more of the house's facade, including the main entryway and a clearer view of the symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: The house is partially visible through a gap in the trees, showing the side and roof structure, with the trees forming a thick perimeter.
description_view_3: The front of the house is most visible here, with the main door, porch area, and a driveway or path leading up to the entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a small porch or overhang, partially sheltered by surrounding trees and possibly steps leading up to the entry.
